summary:

This led them directly to conclude \( \boxed{\text{C}} \) without needing further elaboration beyond confirming this specific match between text details and options given for accuracy purposes only regarding location within body parts like tendon or ligament areas where such tissues are known to reside abundantly due its structural properties needed therefor maintaining stability under tension forces applied during movement activities etc...
